items.title: Trump and Iran trade new threats after strikes exchanged
items.dek: The US president warns Iran "will have to pay the price" for taking too long to agree a deal, after Tehran vows retaliation to any attacks.
items.body: The US president warns Iran "will have to pay the price" for taking too long to agree a deal, after Tehran vows retaliation to any attacks.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Ukraine says missiles hit military plant deep inside Russia
items.dek: Ukraine's military also says it has struck a Russian oil refinery and a "shadow fleet" oil tanker in the Black Sea.
items.body: Ukraine's military also says it has struck a Russian oil refinery and a "shadow fleet" oil tanker in the Black Sea.
items.author: IriLine Desk
